---
name: New chain profile
about: Propose a new chain to profile, or claim one to write
title: "Add [chain name] profile"
labels: ["chain profile"]
---

## Which chain?

- **Name:**
- **Proposed slug** (lowercase, hyphenated, e.g. `bitcoin-cash`):
- **Category:** layer-1 / layer-2 / sidechain / rollup / appchain
- **Consensus type:** pow / pos / dpos / poa / dag / other

## Are you claiming it?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to write this profile
- [ ] No, I'm just proposing it for someone to pick up

## Why it belongs in the library

<!-- A sentence or two. We prioritize chains with real adoption and a distinct architecture. -->

## Sources you'll use

<!-- Whitepaper, protocol spec, official docs. Primary sources preferred. -->

## Before you start

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and the editorial + MDX rules
- [ ] I'll use [`templates/chain-profile-template.mdx`](../templates/chain-profile-template.mdx) and fill all 11 sections
- [ ] I'll keep it neutral and sourced — no price/investment content, no hype
- [ ] I'll run `npm run build` before opening the PR and submit with `status: "draft"`
